summary: MIS Reports Dashboard testing complete. All features working: 4 sub-tabs (Analytics, Coach Details, Coachee Details, Coach Occupancy), 9 Recharts visualizations, searchable/sortable/paginated tables with CSV export. Backend API returns all required fields. Real-time MongoDB data - no mocking.
critical_code_review_comments: MIS API correctly aggregates all 9 chart datasets from real MongoDB data
Coach details include all 22 fields as specified
Coachee details include all 18 fields as specified
DataTable component properly implements search, sort, pagination, CSV export
data-testid attributes correctly implemented: admin-mis, mis-tab-charts, mis-tab-coaches, mis-tab-coachees, mis-tab-occupancy, mis-search-{filename}, mis-download-{filename}
seed_data_creation: Using existing seeded data - 6 coaches, 6 coachees
context_for_next_testing_agent: MIS Reports fully tested. Key verifications: 1) GET /api/admin/mis returns coach_details, coachee_details, charts with 9 aggregations, 2) All 9 charts render with Recharts (donut, bar, grouped bar, pie), 3) Coach Details table has 18 columns including gender/region/employee_status, 4) Coachee Details table has 16 columns including coaching_status/assigned_coach, 5) Coach Occupancy shows capacity/assigned/available, 6) Search filters across all columns, 7) Column headers clickable for sorting, 8) Export CSV button downloads file, 9) Pagination shows 15 rows per page.

features_verified.mis_reports_tab: VERIFIED - MIS Reports tab visible in admin dashboard
features_verified.4_sub_tabs: VERIFIED - Analytics, Coach Details (6), Coachee Details (6), Coach Occupancy
features_verified.analytics_9_charts: VERIFIED - All 9 charts rendered with Recharts
features_verified.chart_1_coaching_status_donut: VERIFIED - Shows Started 50%, Completed 1, In Progress 33%
features_verified.chart_6_top_coaches_bar: VERIFIED - Fatema, Ajay, Vaishali, Gaurav, Amina, Rajesh
features_verified.coach_details_all_columns: VERIFIED - 18 columns: Name, Email, Gender, Tier, Designation, Location, Region, Business Unit, Competency, Experience (Yrs), Coaching Capacity, Certifications, Expertise Areas, Domains, Employee Status, Assigned, Available, Sessions
features_verified.coachee_details_all_columns: VERIFIED - 16 columns: Name, Email, Gender, Tier, Designation, Location, Region, Business Unit, Competency, Date of Joining, Enrolment Type, Employee Status, Coaching Status, Assigned Coach, Sessions Done, Focus Area
features_verified.coach_occupancy_columns: VERIFIED - Coach Name, Designation, Location, Region, Gender, Tier, Capacity, Assigned, Available, Completed, Total Sessions, Status
features_verified.search_functionality: VERIFIED - Filters table rows across all columns
features_verified.sort_functionality: VERIFIED - Column headers clickable for ascending/descending sort
features_verified.csv_export: VERIFIED - Export CSV button visible and enabled
features_verified.pagination: VERIFIED - Shows row count, page navigation buttons
features_verified.data_testid_attributes: VERIFIED - admin-mis, mis-tab-charts, mis-tab-coaches, mis-tab-coachees, mis-tab-occupancy, mis-search-*, mis-download-*
features_verified.gender_field_populated: VERIFIED - All users have Male/Female gender
features_verified.region_field_populated: VERIFIED - All users have North/South/West region
features_verified.employee_status_populated: VERIFIED - All users have Active status

mocked_apis.note: All data from real MongoDB - no mocking
